ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crop_data" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "area_sown" REAL /* Area sown for the day */,
  "yield" REAL /* Yield of the crop */,
  "inflation" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "price" REAL /* Market price of the crop */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the crop is grown */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmer who manages the crop */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions on the day */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil where the crop is grown */,
  "water_usage" REAL /* Amount of water used for irrigation */,
  "fertilizer_type" TEXT /* Type of fertilizer used */,
  "pest_control_method" TEXT /* Method used for pest control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_data_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_data_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the date */,
  "day_of_year" INTEGER /* Day of the year (1-365) */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the date is a holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the region */,
  "soil_composition" TEXT /* General soil composition of the region */,
  "average_rainfall" REAL /* Average annual rainfall in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season when the crop is grown */,
  "lifecycle" TEXT /* Lifecycle of the crop (e.g., annual, perennial) */,
  "water_requirements" REAL /* Water requirements of the crop */,
  "fertilizer_requirements" TEXT /* Fertilizer requirements of the crop */,
  "disease_resistance" TEXT /* Disease resistance of the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farmers" (
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farmer */,
  "farmer_name" TEXT /* Name of the farmer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where the farmer operates */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of farming experience */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Educational background of the farmer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the farmer */,
  "farm_size" REAL /* Size of the farm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farmers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_region" (
  "crop_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the crop-region association */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the crop is grown */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the crop season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the crop season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_region_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_region_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date */,
  "price" REAL /* Market price of the crop */,
  "inflation" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., government, private, international) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
